description: Add Kokoro Spanish voice support with Web Speech fallback and install requested agent resources.

userStories.title: Install requested agent resources
userStories.description: Install compatible skills/plugins from opensrc and record magictools resource findings.
acceptanceCriteria: The opensrc Codex skill exists at C:\Users\Admin\.codex\skills\opensrc\SKILL.md.
The opensrc CLI resolves on PATH.
The magictools repository is scanned and documented as resources-only when no Codex skill/plugin manifests are present.
userStories.notes: magictools has no SKILL.md or plugin.json files.

userStories.title: Add Kokoro Spanish TTS provider
userStories.description: Route app speech through a configurable Kokoro-compatible endpoint using Spanish language code e and voice ef_dora, with Web Speech fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: speakAsync posts text, lang, kokoroLang e, and voice ef_dora to a configured endpoint.
Failed endpoint requests fall back to browser Web Speech API.
NPCLine and WinScreen continue using the existing speak entry point.
README documents the Kokoro endpoint contract and backend run command.
userStories.notes: Reference FastAPI backend is in server/kokoro_tts_api.py.
